title: Optimized ERC1155 safeBatchTransferFrom with identity precompile batch copy
explanation: Iterates efficiently over two arrays simultaneously to update storage. The standout optimization is using `staticcall` to the identity precompile (address `0x04`) to copy the arrays into memory for event emission and external hook payload construction, bypassing expensive Yul loops.
when_to_apply: ERC1155 batch transfers where arrays are copied to memory
